mapper.select: SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, title, content, privacy_settings AS privacySettings, user_id AS userId, files_no AS filesNo, add_date AS addDate FROM notice ORDER BY add_date DESC, notice_no DESC
SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, title, content, privacy_settings AS privacySettings, user_id AS userId, files_no AS filesNo, add_date AS addDate FROM notice WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo}

SELECT details_no AS detailsNo, files_name AS filesName, files_size AS filesSize, files_type AS filesType, files_path AS filesPath, files_uuid AS filesUuid, files_no AS filesNo FROM files_details WHERE files_no = #{filesNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( notice_no, title, content, privacy_settings, user_id, files_no, add_date ) VALUES ( notice_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{privacySettings}, #{userId}, #{filesNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, privacy_settings = #{privacySettings}, files_no = #{filesNo}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE notice_no = #{noticeNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
